high_value_claims.claim: Ramin Mahmoudi authored a master's thesis titled "Additively Manufactured Photopolymer Mold Inserts for Low-Volume Micro-Injection Molding."

high_value_claims.risk_note: Do not infer that the degree has been awarded unless separately confirmed.

high_value_claims.risk_note: The document identifies the programme and major but does not independently prove graduation or degree conferral.

high_value_claims.claim: The thesis investigated additively manufactured photopolymer mold inserts embedded in metallic frames for micro-injection molding of thin-walled, endoscopy-representative components.
high_value_claims.evidence: This thesis evaluates additively manufactured photopolymer mold inserts embedded in metallic frames for micro-injection molding of thin-walled, endoscopy-representative components.
high_value_claims.safe_wording: Investigated AM photopolymer mold inserts in metallic frames for micro-injection molding of thin-walled endoscopy-representative components.
high_value_claims.risk_note: This is academic/research work; do not describe it as commercial production experience unless separately supported.

high_value_claims.risk_note: The document supports research use, not necessarily professional certification or production-level mastery.

projects.claim: The thesis project evaluated photopolymer mold inserts for low-volume micro-injection molding.
projects.evidence: The overall objective of this thesis is to evaluate the feasibility of using additively manufactured photopolymer mold inserts, embedded in metallic support frames, for low-volume micro-injection molding of thin-walled components representative of endoscopic products.
projects.safe_wording: Evaluated AM photopolymer mold inserts for low-volume micro-injection molding in a master's thesis project.
projects.risk_note: Do not generalize the result to all photopolymer tooling or all medical devices.

projects.claim: The project compared Formlabs Rigid 10K, Formlabs High Temp, BASF Ultracur3D RG 3280, and Stratasys Digital ABS Plus as mold insert materials.
projects.evidence: Four insert materials are investigated (Formlabs Rigid 10K, Formlabs High Temp, BASF Ultracur3D RG 3280, and Stratasys Digital ABS Plus)
projects.safe_wording: Compared Rigid 10K, High Temp, Ultracur3D RG 3280, and Digital ABS Plus as candidate AM mold insert materials.
projects.risk_note: Do not claim broad materials expertise beyond these researched materials unless separately supported.

projects.claim: The project evaluated antisticking strategies including ta-C-based PVD coating and semi-permanent chemical release.
projects.evidence: compare anti-sticking strategies (e.g., ta-C-based PVD coatings versus semi-permanent chemical release)
projects.safe_wording: Evaluated ta-C-based PVD coating and semi-permanent chemical release as antisticking strategies.
projects.risk_note: The document reports thesis-specific results; do not claim coating process ownership or industrial coating qualification.

projects.claim: The project included a scaled 0.6x part geometry in Trial 3 to investigate size effects on flow and demolding.
projects.evidence: Trial 3 targeted three coupled levers... uniformly downscaling the part geometry to 0.6× to shorten flow length, reduce projected contact area, and lower the required pressure/packing severity.
projects.safe_wording: Investigated a 0.6x scaled geometry to study flow robustness and demolding behavior.
projects.risk_note: Do not infer full product design ownership.

research_or_thesis_evidence.claim: The thesis included a literature review on AM mold inserts, photopolymer tooling behavior, and rapid tooling strategies.
research_or_thesis_evidence.evidence: Chapter 2 reviews the relevant literature on AM mold inserts, photopolymer tooling behavior, and rapid tooling strategies.
research_or_thesis_evidence.safe_wording: Conducted literature review on AM mold inserts, photopolymer tooling behavior, and rapid tooling strategies.
research_or_thesis_evidence.risk_note: Do not infer publication in a peer-reviewed journal.

research_or_thesis_evidence.claim: The research used a systematic parameter extraction from prior studies.
research_or_thesis_evidence.evidence: To move beyond a purely narrative literature review and toward a data-driven understanding of AM mold inserts, a systematic parameter extraction was carried out across a focused set of prior studies.
research_or_thesis_evidence.safe_wording: Performed systematic parameter extraction from prior AM rapid tooling studies.
research_or_thesis_evidence.risk_note: This is thesis research methodology, not necessarily a formal systematic review publication.

research_or_thesis_evidence.claim: The thesis defined four research objectives covering fabrication fidelity, hybrid tool integration, process-window feasibility, and demolding/adhesion.
research_or_thesis_evidence.evidence: The specific research objectives are: Objective O1... Objective O2... Objective O3... Objective O4...
research_or_thesis_evidence.safe_wording: Structured thesis research around fabrication fidelity, hybrid tool integration, process-window feasibility, and demolding/adhesion.
research_or_thesis_evidence.risk_note: Objectives describe research scope, not proven industry responsibilities.

research_or_thesis_evidence.claim: The thesis concluded that hybrid photopolymer inserts are feasible only within a bounded operating window.
research_or_thesis_evidence.evidence: Overall, hybrid photopolymer inserts are feasible within a bounded operating window.
research_or_thesis_evidence.safe_wording: Concluded that hybrid photopolymer inserts are feasible within a bounded operating window under the studied conditions.
research_or_thesis_evidence.risk_note: Do not state universal feasibility for all tooling, polymers, machines, or geometries.

skills.safe_wording: Applied additive manufacturing to polymer mold insert tooling in thesis research.

skills.claim: Mold insert design and feed-system design

skills.safe_wording: Designed cavity count, gate placement, and runner systems for 3D-printed mold inserts.
skills.risk_note: The designs were within a thesis scope and specific tooling constraints.

skills.evidence: Several measurement tools were used across the trials to evaluate the dimensional accuracy of the printed inserts... Digital calipers, micrometers, Micro-Hite, Mitutoyo digital indicator, KEYENCE Digital Microscope, Coordinate Measuring Machine.
skills.safe_wording: Used dimensional metrology tools including calipers, micrometers, height gauge, digital indicator, Keyence microscope, and CMM.
skills.risk_note: Do not infer formal metrology certification.

skills.evidence: During injection trials, two thermal imaging devices captured insert temperature distributions and time-varying profiles.
skills.safe_wording: Used thermal imaging to monitor insert temperature distributions and cooling behavior during injection trials.
skills.risk_note: Absolute thermography accuracy was treated qualitatively in the thesis.

skills.evidence: Trial 1 served as an initial feasibility study... Trial 2 was designed to evaluate improved mold performance... Trial 3 was formulated directly from the Trial 2 lessons...
skills.safe_wording: Applied iterative experimental troubleshooting across three trial campaigns.
skills.risk_note: This is supported as academic experimentation.

achievements.claim: The thesis achieved a stable operating phase in Trial 3 with Rigid 10K small-geometry inserts producing filled parts with minimal flash and smooth demolding.
achievements.evidence: A distinct steady-state regime was reached between Shots 57 and 75... the insert consistently produced filled parts with minimal flash and smooth demolding.
achievements.safe_wording: Established a stable Trial 3 molding phase for scaled Rigid 10K inserts with filled parts, minimal flash, and smooth demolding.
achievements.risk_note: The result is limited to the tested scaled geometry and process conditions.

achievements.claim: The Rigid 10K insert endured more than 60 high-load cycles without structural degradation in Trial 3.
achievements.evidence: The Rigid10K insert endured more than 60 high-load cycles without structural degradation, and the injection campaign concluded due to scheduling constraints rather than tool failure.
achievements.safe_wording: Demonstrated more than 60 high-load cycles without structural degradation for the scaled Rigid 10K insert in Trial 3.
achievements.risk_note: Do not generalize this cycle count to all Rigid 10K inserts or geometries.

achievements.claim: The thesis identified closure stack-up as a primary gating condition for hybrid photopolymer tooling success.
achievements.evidence: the primary prerequisite for reliable polymer AM tooling in this thesis is closure suitability: the insert height relative to the pocket depth must be tightly controlled...
achievements.safe_wording: Identified closure stack-up control as a key requirement for reliable hybrid photopolymer tooling.
achievements.risk_note: This is a thesis conclusion based on the studied setup.

achievements.claim: The thesis found that chemical release treatment was more effective than ta-C + TiO coating for the tested SLA inserts.
achievements.evidence: the chemically treated core showed clearly smoother release and less severe sticking than its ta-C-based coated counterpart.
achievements.safe_wording: Found that semi-permanent chemical release gave better practical demolding behavior than ta-C + TiO coating under the tested conditions.
achievements.risk_note: Do not present as a universal coating conclusion beyond the tested materials and geometry.

strengths.evidence: Trial 3 was formulated directly from the Trial 2 lessons...
strengths.safe_wording: Demonstrated systematic iteration from Trial 1 through Trial 3 based on observed failure modes and measurements.
strengths.risk_note: This is a factual process strength, not third-party praise.

strengths.claim: Evidence of careful limitation handling and cautious interpretation
strengths.evidence: The simulations were not intended to define final process settings... thermal results are interpreted only as qualitative cycling-level indicators...
strengths.safe_wording: Interpreted simulation and thermal measurement results with explicit limitations.
strengths.risk_note: Do not convert this into a personality claim such as 'always cautious' without external evidence.
